# Kennion Benefit Advisors

> A full-service employee benefits advisory firm headquartered in Vestavia, Alabama. Kennion helps employers of every size design, market, deliver, and manage group health, dental, vision, and supplemental benefits across fully insured, level-funded, and self-funded funding strategies. We bring the strategy, technology, analytics, and partner network of a national firm to employers across the United States.

Kennion Benefit Advisors is an independent employee benefits advisor. We work for the employer, not the insurer — taking each group to market, negotiating on the client's behalf, and managing the program year over year. Our client retention has stayed above 95% for over a decade.

## Services

- [Benefits Strategy & Plan Design](https://www.kennion.com/): We start with your goals and budget, then architect a benefits program that fits — medical, dental, vision, life, disability, and supplemental.
- [Marketing & Carrier Placement](https://www.kennion.com/): We take your group to market, negotiate on your behalf, and bring back options built around leverage.
- [Data, Analytics & Benchmarking](https://www.kennion.com/): Claims insight, utilization trends, and peer benchmarking to ground every decision in evidence.
- [Benefits Administration & Technology](https://www.kennion.com/): Modern enrollment and administration platforms that streamline open enrollment for HR teams.
- [Compliance, ACA & ERISA](https://www.kennion.com/): Reporting, notices, and documentation handled so employers stay current.
- [Pharmacy & Rx Strategy](https://www.kennion.com/): Strategies that manage one of the fastest-growing cost drivers without hurting members.
- [Employee Communication & Engagement](https://www.kennion.com/): Year-round communication and decision support so employees actually use their benefits.
- [Ongoing Service & Advocacy](https://www.kennion.com/): A dedicated team for claims questions, billing, mid-year changes, and renewals.

## Who We Serve

Employers of every size — small business, the middle market, and large, multi-location organizations — across every funding strategy: fully insured, level funded, and traditional self-funded.

## How It Works

1. **Discover.** We learn your workforce, your goals, and where your current program falls short.
2. **Strategize.** We model funding options and design a program built around your budget and your people.
3. **Market & place.** We take your group to the right partners and negotiate on your behalf.
4. **Implement.** Enrollment, technology, and employee communication — set up and handled.
5. **Manage.** Renewals, compliance, claims advocacy, and strategy reviews, all year long.

## About

- **Headquarters:** 2828 Old 280 Court, Vestavia, Alabama 35243
- **Coverage area:** United States, with concentration in the Southeast (AL, GA, MS, TN, FL)
- **Founder:** Hunter Shepherd
- **Experience:** More than 50 years advising employers
- **Differentiator:** Independent, client-first advisory model; a full spectrum of solutions, programs, and partners under one roof; client retention above 95%

## Contact

- **Request a proposal:** https://www.kennion.com/quote
- **Schedule a call:** https://calendly.com/kennion/call
- **General support:** support@kennion.com
- **Sales (Hunter Shepherd):** hunter@kennion.com - 205-641-0469

## What This Site Indexes

Only the homepage (https://www.kennion.com/) and the proposal request page (https://www.kennion.com/quote) are publicly indexable. Client and staff tools, individual quote pages, login flows, and the API are intentionally not indexed — they require authentication and are not relevant to public discovery.
